regions.us-ports: Today in Miami, expect east-southeast winds at 11 knots with drizzle and a 46% rain probability, which may affect embarkation and shore excursions with occasional light precipitation and reduced visibility. Cruise vessels should prepare for these steady easterly winds and light rain over the coming days, which may require adjustments in scheduling or tender operations.

Overall, steady ESE winds and light drizzle will be the primary factors influencing ship handling and guest activities throughout the region.
